examples: Sometimes the decisions baffle and enrage me.
Top 20 children's questions which baffle parents.
The swindler tried to baffle him out of his money, but in vain.
Either some meaning has been lost in translation or the owners are trying to out-baffle English-speaking tourists.
Cellini's landlady hasn't connected with the world since the 1950s--even microwave ovens utterly baffle her.
